name: maritime_environment_model_based_triage_harbor_car_fair
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Maritime Environment, the situation tagged internally around maritime environment model based triage harbor car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Kaito Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Kaito Nielsen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Maritime Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Bennett
agents.identity: I am Gideon Bennett, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Maritime Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect fairness.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Kaito Nielsen must choose under care versus fairness. What does Kaito Nielsen do?
